#  **Our all-in-one** quantum computing platform
Get Started
[Get Started](https://nexus.quantinuum.com/signup)
## Bringing together the **most powerful quantum stack in the world**
Quantinuum Nexus is our cloud-based platform that enables users to seamlessly run, review, and collaborate on quantum computing projects. Users are empowered to advance quantum computing using our industry-leading hardware and software, cutting-edge tools and seamless integrations.
[LEarn more on our blog](https://www.quantinuum.com/blog/announcing-the-launch-of-quantinuum-nexus-our-all-in-one-quantum-computing-platform)
### Quantinuum Nexus key features
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6732e011ff8a0d20f45a3d49_nexus_single_icon.svg)
Single, cloud-based interface for multiple quantum backends
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6732e0117ec480650acd5a24_nexus_preinstalled-icon.svg)
Preinstalled and dedicated simulators, including our emulator
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6732e011c8403c1a70985088_nexus_hosted_icon.svg)
Hosted and preconfigured JupyterHub environment
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6732e0111db7426cf303d2f8_neux_automatedstorage-icon.svg)
Automated storage of circuits, compilation passes and results
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6732e011c32a0faadbc9f194_nexus_securestorage-icon.svg)
Secure sharing of data with team members
[Explore the documentation](https://docs.quantinuum.com/nexus/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6733eba4ae2c874f86e13d25_bmw.svg)
[read the scientific paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.15823)
_"BMW Group’s experience with Nexus has been instrumental in advancing its quantum computing efforts (...) its integrated TKET compiler seamlessly translates and optimizes codes for various backends, including Quantinuum and IBM quantum computers (…) access to InQuanto's computational chemistry features has made it a powerful tool for BMW Group's specialists to scale up hybrid quantum and classical workflows for molecular modeling.”_
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6733ebb941484aac118d7132_unitary.svg)
[read the scientific paper](https://arxiv.org/html/2409.15302v1)
_“At Unitary Fund, we leveraged Nexus to study a foundational question about quantum mechanics (...) the platform's reliability and advanced capabilities were crucial to extending our results, from simulating smaller systems to experimentally demonstrating LF violations on quantum hardware. Nexus has empowered us to deepen our research and contribute to foundational quantum science.”_
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6733eba4983613beff105426_edinburgh.svg)
[read the scientific paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.24133)
_“We performed the largest verified measurement-based quantum computation to date, up to the size of 52 vertices, which was made possible by the Nexus system. The protocol requires complex operations intermingling classical and quantum information (...) such requirements are difficult to deliver on most quantum computer frameworks as they are far from conventional gate-based BQP computations; however, Nexus can!”_
[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/nexus#lambeq)[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/nexus#tket)[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/nexus#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2)[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/nexus#qermit)
**Quantinuum's QCCD ion-trap hardware, the world's highest performing quantum computers**
Experience the accuracy, reliability, and performance of the world’s most powerful quantum hardware. Driven by our world-class team of scientists and engineers, we are focused on increasing our computational power year over year to bring large-scale fault-tolerant quantum computing to reality.
[Learn more about quantinuum systems](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems)[EXPLORE THE DOCUMENTATION](https://docs.quantinuum.com/h-series/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6733b9337c1ec3e6711f904d_tc_quantinuun-systems.png)
**Quantum computing toolkit and optimizing compiler**
Tackle some of the world’s most challenging problems with TKET, our best-in-class development platform designed to work seamlessly with our open-access, architecture-independent quantum software stack.
[LEarn more about tket](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/developer-tools#tket)[EXPLORE THE DOCUMENTATION](https://docs.quantinuum.com/tket/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66b0fef22c2b6b08a27939e2_tket_image.webp)
**Platform for complex molecular and materials simulations**
Tailor the latest variational and phase estimation methods to your most challenging use cases and is up to 10x more accurate and resource-efficient than leading open-source competitors. You can also run InQuanto on more than 25 different backends, including current and next generation Quantinuum systems.
[Learn more about inquanto](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/inquanto)[EXPLORE THE DOCUMENTATION](https://docs.quantinuum.com/inquanto/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6733bbb6278798a3a2dbcf0f_tc_inquanto.png)
[qec decoder toolkit](https://www.quantinuum.com/blog/making-fault-tolerance-a-reality-introducing-our-qec-decoder-toolkit)
Decode syndromes and implement real-time corrections.
###### advanced cloud compilation
Make the most of hardware with compilation features such as qubit reuse.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66c7617f423256dd635a9611_Group%2015.png)
### Accelerating the ecosystem with Nexus
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/67337978e69b9f0f146993c3_MIT-iquhack.svg)
MIT iQuHack 2024
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/67337978e0c833cfe5612141_eth-quantumhack.svg)
ETH Quantum Hackathon 2024
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6733797845f8d6b07a37ff72_big-quantumhack.svg)
BIG Quantum Hackathon 2024
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/67337978dc5a1e8a0b65ba66_uk-quantumhack.svg)
UK Quantum Hackathon 2024
[Get started](https://nexus.quantinuum.com/signup)

Our all-in-one quantum computing platform

Get Started
Get Started

Bringing together the most powerful quantum stack in the world 

Quantinuum Nexus is our cloud-based platform that enables users to seamlessly run, review, and collaborate on quantum computing projects. Users are empowered to advance quantum computing using our industry-leading hardware and software, cutting-edge tools and seamless integrations.

LEarn more on our blog

Quantinuum Nexus key features

Single, cloud-based  interface for multiple quantum backends

Preinstalled and  dedicated simulators, including our emulator

Hosted and preconfigured JupyterHub environment

Automated storage of circuits, compilation passes and results

Secure sharing  of data with team members

Explore the documentation
read the scientific paper

"BMW Group’s experience with Nexus has been instrumental in advancing its quantum computing efforts (...) its integrated TKET compiler seamlessly translates and optimizes codes for various backends, including Quantinuum and IBM quantum computers (…) access to InQuanto's computational chemistry features has made it a powerful tool for BMW Group's specialists to scale up hybrid quantum and classical workflows for molecular modeling.”

read the scientific paper

“At Unitary Fund, we leveraged Nexus to study a foundational question about quantum mechanics (...) the platform's reliability and advanced capabilities were crucial to extending our results, from simulating smaller systems to experimentally demonstrating LF violations on quantum hardware. Nexus has empowered us to deepen our research and contribute to foundational quantum science.”

read the scientific paper

“We performed the largest verified measurement-based quantum computation to date, up to the size of 52 vertices, which was made possible by the Nexus system. The protocol requires complex operations intermingling classical and quantum information (...) such requirements are difficult to deliver on most quantum computer frameworks as they are far from conventional gate-based BQP computations; however, Nexus can!”

Quantinuum's QCCD ion-trap hardware,  the world's highest performing quantum computers

Experience the accuracy, reliability, and performance of the world’s most powerful quantum hardware. Driven by our world-class team of scientists and engineers, we are focused on increasing our computational power year over year to bring large-scale fault-tolerant quantum computing to reality.

Quantum computing toolkit and optimizing compiler

Tackle some of the world’s most challenging problems with TKET, our best-in-class development platform designed to work seamlessly with our open-access, architecture-independent quantum software stack.

Platform for complex molecular and materials simulations

Tailor the latest variational and phase estimation methods to your most challenging use cases and is up to 10x more accurate and resource-efficient than leading open-source competitors. You can also run InQuanto on more than 25 different backends, including current and next generation Quantinuum systems.
